description: Extracts JSON from LLM responses that may contain markdown code blocks, explanatory text, or other formatting. Returns the first valid JSON object or array found.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The text containing JSON to extract

inputs.name: return_all
inputs.description: Return all JSON objects found instead of just the first

outputs.name: json
outputs.description: The extracted JSON (object, array, or null if not found). If return_all is true, returns array of all found JSON.

outputs.name: raw_match
outputs.description: The raw string that was parsed (useful for debugging)
